# EU Brokers

Transparent pricing for every budget.

Best for starters, excellent UI and overall low commissions.

No commissions, social platform, and pies for automated investing.

Stocks, ETF, bonds and crypto. Good UI and free saving plans.

## Homepage
- https://eubrokers.pages.dev/ - Main comparison page.

## Broker comparison
- Lightyear — €0 info, 0.1% maintenance, €0 stocks fees, 0.35% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, with fee inactivity, FCA/EFSA regulation, £85k/€20k protection.
- Trading 212 — €0 info, €0 maintenance, €0 stocks fees, 0.5% ETF fees, €1 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, no inactivity fee, FCA/CySEC/BaFin regulation, £85k/€20k protection.
- MyInvestor — €0 info, 0.12% maintenance, 0.12% stocks fees, 0.5% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, yes inactivity fee, CNMV regulation, €100k protection.
- Trade Republic — €0 info, €1 maintenance, €1 stocks fees, 0.5% ETF fees, €1 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, with fee inactivity, BaFin/CNMV/BCE regulation, €100k protection.
- XTB — €0 info, €0 maintenance, €0 stocks fees, 0.5% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €10/mo withdrawal, no inactivity fee, FCA/CySEC/CNMV/KNF regulation, £85k/€20k protection.
- N26 — €0 info, €0 maintenance, €0 stocks fees, 0% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, yes inactivity fee, BaFin/CySEC/MiFID II/FMA regulation, €20k protection.
- eToro — €0 info, €0 maintenance, €0 stocks fees, 0.5% ETF fees, €50 FX fee, €0 to €5 min deposit, €10/mo withdrawal, yes inactivity fee, $75 fee (ACATS) securities transfer, FCA/CySEC/CNMV regulation, €20k protection.
- DeGiro — €0 info, €1 maintenance, €1-3 stocks fees, 0.25% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, with fee inactivity, FCA/AFM/BaFin/CNMV regulation, €100k protection.
- Interactive Brokers — €0 info, €1 maintenance, €1 stocks fees, 0.002% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, with fee inactivity, FCA/CBI regulation, €100k protection.
- Revolut — €0 info, 0.25% maintenance, 0.25% stocks fees, 0.5% to 1% ETF fees, 0.5% to 1% FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, with fee inactivity, FCA/CNMV/MiFID regulation, €100k protection.
- Scalable Capital — €0 info, €0.99 maintenance, €0.99 stocks fees, 0.99% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €0 min deposit, €0 withdrawal, yes inactivity fee, FCA/BaFin/AMF/CONSOB/CNMV/FMA regulation, €100k protection.
- Freedom24 — €0 info, 0.5% + €0.012 maintenance, 0.5% + €0.012 stocks fees, 0.01% ETF fees, €0 FX fee, €7 withdrawal, €0 inactivity, €100 per ISIN securities transfer, CySEC/MiFID/SEC/BaFin regulation, €20k protection.

## Notes
- This site is a comparison resource, not a broker.
- Fees and protections may change over time.
- Users should confirm details directly with each provider.
